ocr_findings.description: Illustration of person at safe and manga-style mascot rendered as absent (expected: no text in those illustrations). Diagram 'リスクマネジメント > 情報セキュリティマネジメント > ISMS' rendered as ASCII tree — acceptable approximation of the nested-circle diagram in the image.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 15-03 情報セキュリティマネジメント. Substantial body text explaining ISMS, shadow IT, and BYOD is fully captured. Cleaned OCR handled the illustration and nested-concept diagram well with an ASCII tree fallback. No high-severity issues.
